creator: wxs@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Tue, Jun 16, 2009 at 03:30:09AM +0000, Michael Scheidell wrote:
> The following reply was made to PR ports/135615; it has been noted by GNATS.
> 
> From: Michael Scheidell <scheidell@secnap.net>
> To: bug-followup@FreeBSD.org
> Cc:  
> Subject: Re: ports/135615: mail/p5-Mail-SpamAssassin - Update to pkg-message
> Date: Mon, 15 Jun 2009 23:22:21 -0400
> 
>  I have no idea what this is for, and don't have the patience to be a 
>  mind reader.

My reading of the patch tells me that it is a grammar/spelling fixes to
pkg-message.

>  close this, I won't approve it.

Now that you know what it is can you please take a second look at it as
it does improve the contents of pkg-message. If you still do not want
this committed I will close it but I think this patch is harmless and
helpful.

-- WXS
